query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN hasCompletedOnboarding tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN subscriptionTier enum('free', 'premium') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
ADD COLUMN investmentHorizon enum('short', 'medium', 'long') DEFAULT NULL;
